    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "6, ['Request for current insurer name (no field for insurer identity)', 'Request for current policy number (no field for external insurer policy reference)', 'Offer of luxury private jet and accommodation protection (beyond travel insurance categories)', 'Offer of eco-friendly replacements for property coverage (no field for sustainability or eco options)', 'Offer of smart home protection (no field for IoT or smart home features)', 'Optional partial inclusion of wellness program (no field for partial inclusion or flexible add-on selection)']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "15, ['Health insurance plan details with plan_name, plan_type, monthly_cost, coverage_tier, and quality_rating', 'Mental health plan with family therapy and crisis intervention (health_insurance_specific)', 'Property insurance plan with luxury items covered and electronics coverage', 'Travel insurance plan with medical evacuation and adventure sports coverage', 'Add-on adventure travel coverage (specialized_coverage.adventure_travel_addon)', 'Telemedicine services inclusion (health_insurance_specific.telemedicine_included)', 'Gym reimbursement and preventive care (health_insurance_specific.gym_reimbursement, preventive_care_covered)', 'Wellness program inclusion (insurance_plans.wellness_programs_included)', 'Emergency coordination and evacuation support (travel_insurance_specific.emergency_coordination, medical_evacuation)', 'Quality rating and deductible information (insurance_plans.quality_rating, deductible_percentage)', 'Coverage transition timeline management (policy_timeline.current_policy_expiry, new_coverage_start)', 'Proposal of cost range and total monthly cost (cost_analysis.proposed_monthly_cost)', 'Confirmation of plan availability and enrollment window (availability_status.enrollment_window_open)', 'Implementation or transition coordination (scheduling_information.transition_coordination_needed)', 'Request to align new coverage start date after billing cycle (policy_timeline.new_coverage_start, transition_period_needed)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
